mapper.insert: INSERT INTO decision_signals (stock_code, stock_name, signal_type, strength, source, target_price, stop_loss_price, trigger_price, position_pct, reasoning, confidence, status, valid_until, report_id, created_at) VALUES (#{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{signalType}, #{strength}, #{source}, #{targetPrice}, #{stopLossPrice}, #{triggerPrice}, #{positionPct}, #{reasoning}, #{confidence}, #{status}, #{validUntil}, #{reportId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE decision_signals SET stock_code=#{stockCode}, stock_name=#{stockName}, signal_type=#{signalType}, strength=#{strength}, source=#{source}, target_price=#{targetPrice}, stop_loss_price=#{stopLossPrice}, trigger_price=#{triggerPrice}, position_pct=#{positionPct}, reasoning=#{reasoning}, confidence=#{confidence}, status=#{status}, valid_until=#{validUntil}, report_id=#{reportId} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE signal_type = #{signalType} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM decision_signals ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT * FROM decision_signals WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} AND created_at > #{after}
